parcour.epitech_desc: Beginning of my journey in computer science
parcour.bac_desc: Obtained the French Baccalaureate with majors in Mathematics & SIN (Computer and Digital Sciences)
parcour.lycee_desc: Beginning of my specialization in computer science.

about_me.presentation: I have been passionate about IT for as long as I can remember. I started programming through various projects in several languages, and over the years, I have honed my technical skills as a self-taught enthusiast. Now a student at Epitech, I apply my personal work philosophy to further deepen my expertise. I am curious, a team player, and always eager to learn.
